name: karpathy-kb
description: Maintain a personal Obsidian knowledge base with source-reader and a Karpathy-style LLM-maintained wiki workflow.

interface.longDescription: Maintain a personal Obsidian knowledge base using raw notes, confirmed wiki publishing, and token-aware source reading.
defaultPrompt: 读取这个链接并给我预览
沉淀这份资料到知识库
发布最近一篇 raw 到 wiki
